competitors.name: Caulipower
competitors.action: Acquired by Urban Farmer (a Paine Schwartz Partners portfolio company and specialty dough co-manufacturer). Deal announced November 2025, surfacing in coverage March 2026.
competitors.notes: Caulipower losing indie brand status. Now backed by large-scale co-manufacturer — could signal wider distribution or private label risk.

competitors.name: Dr. Oetker
competitors.action: Launched Suprema range in UK (October 2025) featuring triple-fermented sourdough crust baked over 400°C on hot stone, no flavor enhancers, no added colors, premium Italian ingredients.
competitors.notes: Direct competitive signal — largest frozen pizza co. now competing on fermented sourdough crust, Real Dough's core differentiator. UK only for now but U.S. rollout likely.

competitors.name: Yough
competitors.action: Launched Greek yogurt-based high-protein frozen pizza nationwide at ~2,000 Target stores (March 17, 2026). SKUs: Mozzarella Cheese, Uncured Pepperoni, Farmer's Vegetable.
competitors.notes: Functional/high-protein angle competing for health-conscious Target shopper. Hitting exact same Target demographic as Real Dough at scale.

competitors.name: Cape Cod Cafe
competitors.action: Expanded frozen pizza line (Cheese, Pepperoni, Buffalo Chicken, Onion Pepper) to ~400 Target stores in Northeast/Mid-Atlantic/Southeast starting March 1, 2026.
competitors.notes: Regional brand going national via Target. Regional authenticity play — similar positioning to Real Dough. Worth monitoring shelf placement.

trends.magnitude: Category expanding — major players (Dr. Oetker, Nestlé) now investing in fermented crust tech
trends.context: Premium sourdough/artisan frozen pizza identified as high-growth niche for 2026. Neapolitan-style, stone-fired, fermented crusts are the category differentiator. Real Dough's core positioning is becoming mainstream competitive territory.

trends.magnitude: New entrant (Yough) launching 2,000-store Target rollout March 2026
trends.context: Gen Z and health-conscious consumers driving demand for protein-packed formats. Yough's Greek yogurt crust is newest example. Category increasingly bifurcating: indulgent/premium vs. functional/healthy.

trends.magnitude: 55% of Gen Z cite comfort foods as top in-home meal priority; 12%+ annual growth in organic/clean-label frozen
trends.context: Gen Z buying frozen but favoring premium, clean-label, restaurant-quality. 20-25% premiums accepted for sustainable options. Aligns with Real Dough's target demo — validates premium positioning.
Broader frozen pizza market growing steadily. U.S. frozen bakery segment (includes pizza) projected at $17B by 2030. Category is healthy.

market_data.metric: Producer Price Index — Frozen Specialty Food Mfg
market_data.change: +0.57% MoM from 195.619 (Dec 2025); down from 2025 peak of 204.155 (Jun 2025)

market_data.metric: Supermarket frozen meal shelf space allocation increase

breaking.headline: Caulipower acquired by Urban Farmer / Paine Schwartz Partners
breaking.summary: Better-for-you frozen pizza brand Caulipower now owned by large specialty dough co-manufacturer. Signals consolidation in the premium-adjacent frozen pizza space.

breaking.headline: Yough Greek Yogurt Pizza launches in ~2,000 Target stores
breaking.summary: New functional frozen pizza brand hits Target at scale targeting Gen Z / health-forward shoppers. High-protein, Greek yogurt crust positioning.
